title: Orbital Strike | Wemmbu Style
description: A project I made for my personal server to be like Wemmbu's Orbital Strike from the UnstableSMP
body:
# **Requires OP Perms To Use**

This **SERVER SIDE** mod adds the ability to use the Stab Shot and TnT Rain from Wemmbu's Videos onto your server

Stab shot is a little more powerful than his but oh well, I wont be updating this mod much or even at all, If you want something added please join my server and ask

## Commands
-  /orbital stab
>   - Gives the orbital stab shot
-  /orbital tnt
>   - Gives the orbital TnT rain
-  /orbital death
>   - Something I was testing and is scrapped
-  /orbital dev
>   - Just give errors and dev logs
